models.partners: External business introducers who onboard subscribers on the platform. Partners have their own accounts, can view their linked subscribers, and earn commissions on business they bring in.
models.linkedSubscribers: Subscribers that have been onboarded by a specific partner. Shows subscriber details and their incident count.
models.payouts: System-calculated commission payments sent to partners based on their linked subscribers' activity.
models.documents: Uploaded business documents like GST certificates, PAN cards, and other compliance documentation.
models.activityLog: Complete audit trail of all actions taken on a partner account for tracking and compliance.

relationships: Each Partner has many Linked Subscribers (customers they brought in)
Each Partner has many Payouts (commission payments based on subscriber activity)
Each Partner can upload multiple Documents (GST, PAN, etc.)
Each Partner has an Activity Log tracking all account changes and actions

followUps.notes: Completed partner onboarding for Gurugram region. Documents verified and account activated.
Activated 3 outlets in Delhi NCR. QR codes deployed and tested successfully.
Conducted staff training at Karol Bagh outlet. Covered challan processing and customer handling.
Mobilised field team for Dwarka and Noida outlets. Partner confirmed readiness.
Refresher training for outlet staff on updated challan process and new QR flow.
Onboarding process initiated for Mumbai partner. KYC documents collected and verified.
Activated Andheri outlet. High footfall observed, suggested adding second QR station.
Mobilised support team for Thane expansion. Resources allocated for next quarter.
Onboarding kickoff for Gurugram partner. Discussed setup requirements and timelines.
Activated partner account for Hyderabad. 2 outlets configured and QR codes generated.
Conducted training session for outlet staff. Covered onboarding checklist and challan workflow.
Mobilised field team for Kolkata region. Reviewed infrastructure and staff readiness.
Activation completed for Kolkata partner. Partner reported smooth operations.
